text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the tryouts has come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I was hoping to have formally scouted Manhattan Cafe by
now, an opportune moment hasn't appeared.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: <username>, are you really looking to scout her?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Sure, she's a great runner, but the way she keeps going on and on
about that imaginary "friend" of hers is unsettling. You're not put off
by it?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're kidding, right? I can understand wanting to support her,
but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Good morning.

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text:
Waaaaah!
Gyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud, thud, thud!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...
I'm sorry... You were clearly in the middle of something.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are many capable runners set to take to the track today. She'll
need to focus on outpacing them over anything else. Will her friend
end up leading the pack, I wonder...
choice_data_list: Keep your cool and run at your own pace!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I was sure... that you couldn't see her. But it really feels like... you can...
choice_data_list: Sorry, that was a bit quiet. Can you—

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Staff A
text_block_list.text:
The tryouts are about to begin. Would the runners participating
please gather—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...
Please come back here... this evening.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners are at the starting gate. And... they're off! The race has
begun.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(Run... run... run... The smell of the turf... The dirt is nice and firm...
I'm in great form.)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(That person's... That trainer's words seem to have lent a spring to my
step. My breathing is stable... I feel like I could run for much longer
than usual...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (There are so many runners... in front of me...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(But I know that she's there... I know that my friend is up there...
waiting for me to catch up to her.)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (No one else can see her... but she is so dear to me...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(I never did mind that people couldn't believe what they couldn't
see... I only... wished that they would respect her...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (But now...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (That trainer... wants to know more about her...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(Precisely because she can't be seen. Just by saying that... my friend
has finally gotten the respect she deserves.)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(We've endured so much ridicule... So much cruelty... Never been
given the time of day...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(It's time to run past all that... If I can get even a little closer to you
today than I could yesterday... then I...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I can run freely... after you... after my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What acceleration! She pierces through the pack like a needle! She's
like a shadow swallowing everything before her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In contrast to the afternoon's tryouts, the track this evening is still and
silent. Manhattan Cafe stands before me, pensively.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Please, can you listen to me for a moment? I'd like to tell you... about
my friend...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Actually... I can see many, many things that others can't. There are
other beings... besides my friend...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: However... No one has ever believed that when I told them.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
"There's no way they exist." "Creepy." "It's just your imagination."
"You're delusional." "It's all in your head."

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Those awful words... They only served to hurt my precious
companions... It made me sad, too.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Because of that... I tended to keep to myself as a child. I didn't want
them to be hurt... any more.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I was always rather frail... The people around me were never too
surprised that I stayed mostly quiet.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But one day... I saw a girl who looked a lot like me, even if only from
behind... She was running.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And even though I couldn't see her face... I could tell that she was
having fun. I started to feel... envious...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I chased after... Left that dark room that I had shut myself in.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The outside world was bright... Overwhelmingly so. But my friend...
She was still running... Having fun...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I began to wonder... what exactly I was so afraid of. Even though no
one would believe in her... she was able to run without a care...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Since then... my friend has been running ever forward... In front of
me...
choice_data_list: I can see why she's so important to you.
I can see why she's so important to you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes... But I've still...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...This whole time... I've still not seen her face.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I can't catch up... And she never looks back... I've only ever seen her
from behind... as she runs ever forward.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So I want... to catch up. I want to run... at her side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she is telling me this in her usual hushed voiced, I can sense
the straightforward fervor that has welled up inside her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...
You still can't see her, right? So... Um...
choice_data_list: You can tell me more about her anytime.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: I would like to scout you.
I would like to scout you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...
Do you think... I can catch up with her?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thwack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I share a smile with Manhattan Cafe, I feel a strong clap on my
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "I trust you."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no voice—no spoken word. And yet... I can feel the sentiment
coming from someone.
